general_inquiry.question: Find the sum $p(x) + q(x)$ of the following two polynomials: $p(x) = -3 x^2+7 x+3$, $q(x) = -10 x^2-x-14$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response:
The sum \( p(x) + q(x) \) of the polynomials \( p(x) = -3x^2 + 7x + 3 \) and \( q(x) = -10x^2 - x - 14 \) is:

\( p(x) + q(x) = -13x^2 + 6x - 11 \)
